subject: why high gas prices? calif. chaos?

emails.subject: WHY HIGH GAS PRICES? CALIF. CHAOS?
emails.subject_base: WHY HIGH GAS PRICES? CALIF. CHAOS?
emails.body: WHY HIGH GAS PRICES? CALIF. CHAOS? Jeff I know you are a crazily busy man. This is a Q and A format of the 3 page text of a serious brochure for customers of ENA and EES and other Enron publics answering tough questions on today's high gas prices and Calif. power market chaos. I know you are extremely busy but when you can get to it I would like your frank comments. It has been reviewed so far by Janine Migden and Rob Bradley and I have trheir comments included in this document draft 8. The A B C notations you see tie to graphics that support these points. I can send the graphics too if you wish ...thx and regards Margaret
